name: Bharat Startup Yatra
overview: Bharat Startup Yatra is a documentary that highlights innovative startups from Tier 2, Tier 3 cities, and rural India. It captures the journeys of grassroots entrepreneurs, bringing their stories to a national audience. Get ready to witness the incredible journeys of India's boldest entrepreneurs, from spark to success.

trailers.title: Bharat Startup Yatra - Streaming Now ft. Sunny Hinduja | Amazon MX Player
